title: Better Zoom
description: Smoothly zoom with wheel as much as you want, in a simple way with customizations
body:
![Description separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d11bf8db9347a4aa7c37ec13b08ce17ddd41aef2.png)
**Better Zoom v2.3,** allows you to zoom smoothly with wheel scrolling and hotkeys. **It offers simple, essential and unique customizations, in order to give more control, such as mouse sensitivity while zooming.** All that without any mixin, resulting in faster loading speed.

The goal of the mod is to offer a simple smooth wheel zooming (and hotkeys) mod with the essential options only, and no fancy or complicated parameters... while still offering the necessary customizations to give control. The mod runs without mixin and without any additional library.

While it's called Better Zoom, it's just meant to be simple, compatible, including all the necessary features, and offer a good zooming experience. So if you're looking for a simple, optimized and efficient zooming, give it a try! The mod is actively maintained and receive frequrent updates on github.

![Showcase separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e4103784c708e242ed05f27b3306cec0917ef32_0.webp)

Press "c" by default to toggle zoom. (Configurable keybind)

Press "+"/"-" or scroll with wheel to zoom in/out (Configurable)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tO7HGft0IKA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(The config screen changed between the video and latest version* - **see below screenshot for the latest**)

![Configration separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46e970f7ee4273f3bf2aabe3519a436369c420c5_0.webp)
## Default configuration GUI (Forge 1.20.1 reference):
(openable with 'V' keybind by default) and at mods/config...)

![Better Zoom Configuration GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c12927e239920f589eca83302d80ba0a3c42543e_0.webp)
![Configuration gui 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e7163263fa2f77594a27a2b9f41b394719af65e.png)

You can configure: (Tooltips are avilable for more informations).

 - **"Zoom Increment"** - How much zoom it increments per scroll wheel. (useful to zoom/dezoom very quickly)

 - **"Mouse Sensitivity"** - The mouse sensitivity that will be multiplited by when you zoom. (adjust as you need so the camera doesn't move too fast when zooming a lot)

 - **"Hold to Zoom"** - Require to hold the zoom keybind in order to keep zooming

 - **"Smooth Mode"** - Smooth Fade in/out when zooming

## Custom keybinds:
## ![Keybinds config ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/294b32547c4da1ec49e02937897ecee9c486c921.png)
![Translations separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c16287f029416b4b487ba47357c64a4362fb7a09_0.webp)
Translations are available for French and English. Feel free to suggest better ond, or add translations on github!

Issues for suggestions/bugs: https://github.com/AwesomeHippo/BetterZoom/issues

------------------------------
Feel free to add this in any modpack published on curseforge! This is highly appreciated.

The code is open source : https://github.com/AwesomeHippo/BetterZoom under MIT license
and the mod is available on curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-zoom
